results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Llama Guard gates inputs + outputs as binary safety classifier, frozen deployment IS the AKHA-GATE-FILTER mechanism.
Multimodal Llama Guard 4 with prompt+response safety + violated-category enumeration IS the dual-head classifier paradigm.

results.matched_effect_cluster: NeMo Guardrails production runtime safety rails
results.justification: Production guardrails with input + output classification + rule-based filtering IS the frozen-gate routed-fallback paradigm.
4-layer defense with input gatekeeping + MiniBERT detection IS the frozen-detector input-gate paradigm.
Empirical analysis of LLM guardrails as input-side binary classifiers + evasion attacks covers the gate-design space.

results.matched_effect_cluster: OWASP LLM01 prompt injection best practice
results.justification: OWASP best-practice framework for prompt injection defense covers the input-gate boundary classifier paradigm.
Adversarial tokenization attack on safety classifiers covers the input-gate threat model directly.
Llama Guard 3 8B frozen-deployment safety classifier IS the FROZEN gate parameter mechanism.
